message:
refactor(interactive): extract rendering, keybindings, and tree UI into dedicated submodules

The interactive.rs module had grown to contain rendering logic, key
handling, and tree UI code all interleaved. This refactor extracts
cohesive groups of functionality into focused submodules without changing
any behavior.

Specific extractions:

- view.rs: Moved render_header(), render_footer(), render_conversation(),
  render_status_bar(), header_binding_hint(), and all other view/render
  methods that were living directly in interactive.rs. These methods
  produce the TUI frame content and logically belong together.

- keybindings.rs: Added handle_capability_prompt_key() which handles the
  extension capability approval/deny UI (arrow/tab navigation between
  Allow/Deny buttons, Enter to confirm with persistent permission
  recording via PermissionStore, Esc to deny-once). This was extracted
  from inline key handling to keep the capability prompt logic isolated.

- tree.rs: Added view_tree_ui() dispatcher and the three view functions
  (view_tree_selector, view_tree_summary_prompt, view_tree_custom_prompt)
  that render the session tree browser overlay. Previously these were
  inlined in the main view() method.

- model_selector_ui.rs (new, 196 lines): Dedicated module for the model
  selector overlay UI rendering.

- tree_ui.rs (new, 511 lines): Dedicated module for tree browser UI
  rendering components.

The interactive.rs module itself shrinks by ~1200 lines. All pub(super)
visibility is preserved — no public API changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
